_metadata.description: Defines required tags per AWS resource type for ISO 27001 asset inventory compliance

ec2:instance.description: EC2 instances must be tagged for ownership tracking, data classification, and application mapping

ec2:volume.description: EBS volumes must be tagged for data classification and lifecycle management

ec2:snapshot.description: EBS snapshots should be tagged for ownership and retention tracking

ec2:image.description: AMIs should be tagged for ownership tracking

ec2:elastic-ip.description: Elastic IPs should be tagged to identify allocation purpose

s3:bucket.description: S3 buckets must be tagged for data classification and access governance

rds:db-instance.description: RDS instances must be tagged for data classification and ownership

rds:cluster.description: RDS clusters must be tagged for data classification and ownership

lambda:function.description: Lambda functions must be tagged for ownership and lifecycle management

iam:user.description: IAM users must be tagged for access governance and periodic reviews

iam:role.description: IAM roles should be tagged for access governance

ec2:vpc.description: VPCs must be tagged for network segmentation tracking

ec2:subnet.description: Subnets should be tagged for network documentation

ec2:security-group.description: Security groups must be tagged for firewall rule governance

ecs:cluster.description: ECS clusters must be tagged for workload tracking

eks:cluster.description: EKS clusters must be tagged for workload and data classification

route53:hostedzone.description: Route 53 hosted zones should be tagged for DNS governance

cloudfront:distribution.description: CloudFront distributions should be tagged for content delivery governance

sns:topic.description: SNS topics should be tagged for messaging governance

sqs:queue.description: SQS queues should be tagged for messaging governance

secretsmanager:secret.description: Secrets must be tagged for data classification and access governance

kms:key.description: KMS keys should be tagged for cryptographic key governance

annex_a_controls.A.5.9: Inventory of Information and Other Associated Assets
